agreed_next_steps: WHEN READY: Start with g1 — provision VPS and confirm instance size. CX32 (8GB RAM) recommended if running MT5 × 3 simultaneously.
Pre-work: confirm broker VPS policies with Pepperstone and Easy Forex support before provisioning.
DEFERRED (post Spain move): evaluate g5 code-server once stable on primary machine(s).

deferred_ideas.title: code-server: browser-based VS Code dev environment on Linux VPS
deferred_ideas.rationale: Eliminates cross-machine dev setup entirely. Any browser = full VS Code + Claude Code. Costs ~4.49/mo Hetzner CX21. Requires migrating project files from Google Drive to GitHub (mostly done via john-projects-state). MT5 terminals stay local regardless — Windows only. Deferred because Spain move adds too much change simultaneously; state-sync system built Day 8 solves immediate pain.
prerequisites: Complete Spain move and settle on primary machine setup
Finish GitHub migration of project files (john-projects-state is step 1)
Confirm internet reliability at Spain property

activities.title: Provision Hetzner CX21 Linux VPS (~4.49/mo)

Clone all GitHub repos to VPS, set up .env files
Test from tablet and secondary machine — confirm full workflow
